amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 18 — paragraph 1
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 18 — paragraph 1

## Text proposed by the Commission

1. Providers of high-risk AI systems shall draw up the technical documentation referred to in Article 11 in accordance with Annex IV.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

deleted
commission_text: 1. Providers of high-risk AI systems shall draw up the technical documentation referred to in Article 11 in accordance with Annex IV.
